questionHtml: The density of the liquid in the tube is 8.7 × 102 kg m–3 and the density of air is 1.2 kg m–3. The difference in the level of the liquid is 6.0 cm. Determine the speed of air at A.
markschemeHtml:
«ρliquid gh=0.5×ρair v2»

difference in pressure PB-PA=8.7×102×9.8×0.06=510 «Pa» ✔

correct substitution into the Bernoulli equation, eg: 12×1.2v2=510 ✔

v=29 «ms–1» ✔
